_documentation.purpose: Your live portfolio state. Updated manually after each IBKR trade execution.

fields.initial_capital_eur: The starting capital you committed to the strategy on day 1. Set this BEFORE the first run. Never changes after the first rebalance — it stays as a historical reference.
fields.net_capital_contributed_eur: Cumulative NET amount of capital you have put into the strategy (additions minus withdrawals). Initially equals initial_capital_eur. Update this every time you add or withdraw money. Used to calculate real return on capital after cash flows.
fields.cash_eur: Available cash balance in EUR right now. Updated after each rebalance: add proceeds from sells, subtract cost of buys and commissions paid. Also update when injecting or withdrawing capital.
fields.positions: Object containing all open positions, keyed by ticker symbol.
fields.positions.<ticker>.shares: Number of shares held. Can be fractional if your broker and the specific stock support it (most US stocks and many European ones do on IBKR).
fields.positions.<ticker>.avg_price_eur: Average purchase price PER SHARE in EUR. For IBEX stocks this is just the EUR price. For US stocks you need to convert from USD using the exchange rate at the time of purchase. See _example_avg_price_calculation below.
fields.positions.<ticker>.market: Either 'IBEX' for Spanish stocks (BME) or 'SP' for US stocks (NYSE/NASDAQ).
fields.positions.<ticker>.buy_date: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the position was opened. Useful for fiscal tracking.
fields.positions.<ticker>.commission_paid_eur: (Optional) The actual commission you paid for opening this position, in EUR. Useful for accurate P&L tracking.
fields.last_rebalance: ISO date of the last rebalance executed.

_documentation._note: Lines starting with underscore (_) are documentation only and are ignored by the script.

_example_avg_price_calculation.scenario: You bought 5 shares of NVDA at 100 USD each on a day when 1 EUR = 1.1743 USD.
_example_avg_price_calculation.calculation: avg_price_eur = avg_price_usd / eur_usd_rate = 100 / 1.1743 = 85.16 EUR per share
_example_avg_price_calculation.total_cost_eur: 5 shares * 85.16 EUR = 425.79 EUR (this is what you'd see deducted from your EUR cash if IBKR auto-converts; if you have a USD sub-account, your USD balance drops by 500 USD instead)
_example_avg_price_calculation.note: Always use the exchange rate AT THE TIME OF PURCHASE shown in your IBKR trade confirmation, not today's rate. IBKR shows the rate on each trade ticket.

_example_capital_flow_tracking.scenario: Day 1: deposit 2,000 EUR. Year 1: deposit 1,000 EUR more. Year 2: withdraw 500 EUR.
_example_capital_flow_tracking.return_calculation: If portfolio is worth 5,800 EUR at end of year 2, real return = (5800 - 2500) / 2500 = 132%. NOT (5800 - 2000) / 2000 = 190%, which would mix returns with new money.
